The most intimate offer I have

THRIVE
with me.

Let me take all of the planning, researching, and curriculum development off your plate, so you can focus on doing what you love the most — being a calm, present parent.

Once a quarter, I come to your home. You are done doing this alone.

2
Spots
Available
Southern Maine Only
12 Months of Partnership
You have decided.

Homeschooling is definitely the path that is right for your family.

But with your busy schedule and all of the logistics of homeschooling, are you worried you are not able to give your child the intentional, high-quality education they deserve by yourself?

Mama, you do not have to do it alone.

There is no doubt in your mind that homeschooling is right for your family. As a business owner and entrepreneur yourself, you have recognized from the beginning that public school is only geared to help kids succeed in a regular 9-5 job.

You want more for your kids. You want your kids to take classes on topics they are actually interested in, learn financial literacy early, have business and leadership skills ingrained in them, and be set up to succeed in whatever they choose to do later in life. You want them to have the skills, talents, intelligence, and confidence to thrive with or without mainstream education.

I understand and relate to why you have decided homeschooling is the way to go. And good for you, Mama. You should feel proud for choosing to do what is right for you and your family.

But.

I also know that homeschooling on your own can be a lot. Especially if you have other little ones at home, you and your husband are growing a successful company, or homeschooling is simply new for you.

You do not want to send your kids off to a co-op to be taught by someone else. Or sit them in front of a computer to learn from some private online school. You want to be their primary teacher. But you definitely do not have the time or space for all of the logistical planning, curriculum development, and keeping track of everything.

This is where I come in.

Imagine this.

For the next year,
having my support to...

Plan activities personalized to your child

So they enjoy learning and you are productive. No more searching Pinterest last second or tearing apart your cabinets hoping you have the right supplies. I plan it all in advance so you can simply be present with your child.

Deliver curriculum rotation agendas that match your family's values

So you can feel confident your children are not falling behind. In fact, they are thriving. Weekly individual checklists with monthly focuses keep every child on track.

Give you top-level support through the Peace of Mind Process

Aligning your homeschool with your values and your child's interests using my Values and Interests Based Educational System. Built over five years and 35 homeschooling families. Every decision is guided by who your child actually is.

Help you establish a practical and productive rhythm

So your children are learning more efficiently in less time. Giving you more space for family dinners, homeschool friends, adventures outside, and the core memories you actually want to be making.

Provide you with professional guidance and advocacy

So you can look at everyone who questions you and give them a straight answer. You will have the clarity, the records, and the confidence to stand behind the education you are giving your children.

Be in your home four times a year

Because plans made from the outside looking in are not the same as plans built inside your actual life. I come to you, I see your real rhythm, and I build from there. That is the difference with THRIVE.

This is what is possible
when you say yes.

From families inside Thrive

Real families.
Real results.
In their own words.

Maria working with a Thrive family

Both of my children received a well-rounded, organized, and intentional education for their specific needs. Maria took the immense pressure off of our shoulders. She is thoughtful with every curriculum decision she makes for your child, based on parent feedback and what the future looks like for the child. Our daughter was homeschooled for almost 3 years and her desire was to start public high school in 9th grade. Maria got her up to speed with everything she needed to be prepared.

Kristin

As a homeschool parent, The Homeschool Admin helped me gain the confidence that I needed. Working with her I was able to focus on my child's progress all while having organization and structure. She helps create a schedule for each individual child and allows me, the parent, to feel more relaxed and confident while homeschooling. Maria is so easy to work with and I would recommend her to any homeschooling family who wants to stay organized.

Aimee

It is so much easier for my son to navigate his day and he is actually having more fun learning. He is in charge of his learning process and has a fantastic mentor and support. Maria helped him grow, creating a beautiful resume with him and offering a sense of ease and confidence that is not offered in public schooling. My son has told his friends this experience. He feels good about the person he is and about his future.

Shannon
Whether you have

This is for you.

A child about to turn 6

Multiple children at different levels

A high schooler who needs transcripts and a clear path forward

Already started and need a new perspective through deschooling

We can start anytime, even if it is in the middle or end of the year.

This is for you if

You are a Southern Maine family
choosing differently.

You have multiple children

Each child is different. Each child needs something different. You need a system that honors every one of them without burning you out managing it alone.

You are doing this alone

Teacher, administrator, parent, planner. All you. You need someone who understands that weight and is willing to carry part of it with you.

You value freedom over compliance

You are not recreating school at home. You want something real, alive, and built entirely around your family's values and your children's God-given gifts.

You are ready to invest seriously

You understand that your child's education is the most important investment you will ever make. You are not looking for a template. You want the real thing.

Southern
Maine

Geography Matters. Here Is Why.

THRIVE is built around my physical presence in your home. I work with families within a reasonable distance of Scarborough, primarily York County and Cumberland County. Not sure if the distance works? Reach out and we will figure it out. If you are further away, Confidence, my fully remote mailed portfolio program, was built for families just like yours.

One full year of mentorship includes

Everything I have.
Built for your family.

Every element of THRIVE is built for depth, not breadth. Nothing is generic. Everything is designed specifically for your children, your rhythm, your values.

01

Quarterly Home Visits

Four times a year I come to your Southern Maine home. I observe, recalibrate, and adjust the plan based on what is actually happening in your real life with your real children. This is the heartbeat of THRIVE.

02

The Peace of Mind Process

My signature deep dive into your family. Each child's interests, intrinsic motivators, learning styles, your values by subject, your daily constraints. This is how I build something that actually fits your family and does not just look good on paper.

03

Curriculum Rotation Agendas

Monthly personalized agendas that rotate your curriculum thoughtfully across subjects and children. Predictable enough to create rhythm, flexible enough for real life. Yours to print or use digitally.

04

Weekly Individual Checklists with Monthly Focuses

Every child gets their own checklist aligned to a monthly focus area. Age-appropriate, interest-informed, and built to grow with them. Each child gets to navigate their day with ease and actually have fun learning.

05

24/7 SOS Support on Telegram

When something is not working and it cannot wait, you have me. Real time support for the moments that need immediate clarity. You will never feel stuck or overwhelmed without someone to reach out to.

06

Weekly Q&A on Telegram

A dedicated weekly touchpoint for your questions, reflections, and adjustments. You get to reach out when you are ready and ask me things like, "Maria, I found a new writing curriculum. What do you think of it for my daughter?"

07

Physical Portfolio We Fill Together

A real tangible portfolio that grows throughout our year together. Not a mailed template. A blank portfolio we build together, brought to you in person at our quarterly visits, filled with your child's actual year of learning and documentation.

08

Digital Shared Workspace

A shared digital office space where all your agendas, checklists, and our correspondence live. Organized, always accessible, and yours to keep when our year together is complete.

"You've always been your child's best teacher. Let's keep it that way."

Ready to begin

Two spots.
Is one yours?

Are you feeling drawn to work together? Send me a voice message on Instagram and let me know you have been thinking about one of these spots and why. From there we will have a simple voice message conversation about what you are looking for, the support you need, and whether this is the right fit. If it is not the best match, I will share other options that might serve you better. If it is, I will send over the contract, payment link, and all the details to get started.
